records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5805 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Indeed, some poetry contains wisdom, and indeed, some speech has a magical effect."
records.arabicText: 5805 - إِنَّ مِنَ اَلشِّعْرِ لَحِكْمَةً وَ إِنَّ مِنَ اَلْبَيَانِ لَسِحْراً".
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Indeed, some poetry contains wisdom, and indeed, some speech has a magical effect."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5806 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Show mercy to those on the earth, and the One (Allah (swt)) in the heavens will show mercy to you."
records.arabicText: 5806 - اِرْحَمْ مَنْ فِي اَلْأَرْضِ يَرْحَمْكَ مَنْ فِي اَلسَّمَاءِ".

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5807 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Whoever is killed defending his wealth is a martyr."
records.arabicText: 5807 - مَنْ قُتِلَ دُونَ مَالِهِ فَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Whoever is killed defending his wealth is a martyr."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5808 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"The one who takes back his gift is like the one who returns to his vomit."
records.arabicText: 5808 - اَلْعَائِدُ فِي هِبَتِهِ كَالْعَائِدِ فِي قَيْئِهِ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The one who takes back his gift is like the one who returns to his vomit."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5809 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"It is not permissible for a believer to abandon his believing brother for more than three days."
records.arabicText: 5809 - لاَ يَحِلُّ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَهْجُرَ أَخَاهُ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ فَوْقَ ثَلاَثٍ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "It is not permissible for a believer to abandon his believing brother for more than three days."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5810 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Whoever does not show mercy (to others) will not be shown mercy (by Allah (swt) in the Hereafter)."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5811 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Regret (of a sin) is (a form of) repentance."
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Regret (of a sin) is (a form of) repentance."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5812 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"The child is attributed to the (lawful) bed, and for the adulterer, there is the stone (hadd)."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The child is attributed to the (lawful) bed, and for the adulterer, there is the stone (hadd)."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5813 - The Prophet (sw) said; "The one who guides to good is like the one who does it."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The one who guides to good is like the one who does it."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5814 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Your love for something blinds and deafens you." (to its faults and catches)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5815 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"He does not (rightfully) thank Allah (swt), who does not thank people." (for doing good onto him)
records.arabicText: 5815 - لاَ يَشْكُرُ اَللَّهَ مَنْ لاَ يَشْكُرُ اَلنَّاسَ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "He does not (rightfully) thank Allah (swt), who does not thank people." (for doing good onto him)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5816 - The Prophet (sw) said; "No one shelters the misguided except the misguided."
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "No one shelters the misguided except the misguided."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5817 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Protect yourselves from the Fire, even if it is with half a date." (showing the enormous merits of even the modest acts of Charity or 'Sadaqa')
records.arabicText: 5817 - اِتَّقُوا اَلنَّارَ وَ لَوْ بِشِقِّ تَمْرَةٍ".

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5818 - The Prophet (sw) said; "The souls are like recruited soldiers; those that recognize one another will find harmony, and those that do not will be in discord." (regarding spiritual affinity between individuals)
records.arabicText: 5818 - اَلْأَرْوَاحُ جُنُودٌ مُجَنَّدَةٌ فَمَا تَعَارَفَ مِنْهَا اِئْتَلَفَ وَ مَا تَنَاكَرَ مِنْهَا اِخْتَلَفَ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The souls are like recruited soldiers; those that recognize one another will find harmony, and those that do not will be in discord." (regarding spiritual affinity between individuals)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5819 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"The delay in (due) payment by a wealthy person is injustice."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The delay in (due) payment by a wealthy person is injustice."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5820 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Travel (discomforts) is a portion of torment."
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Travel (discomforts) is a portion of torment."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5821 - The Prophet (sw) said; "People are like mines, just as gold and silver mines."
records.arabicText: 5821 - اَلنَّاسُ مَعَادِنُ كَمَعَادِنِ اَلذَّهَبِ وَ اَلْفِضَّةِ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "People are like mines, just as gold and silver mines."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5822 - The Prophet (sw) said; "The host of a gathering has the most right to the forefront of his gathering."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The host of a gathering has the most right to the forefront of his gathering."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5823 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Throw dust onto the faces of those who excessively praise (you)." (advises rejecting excessive flattery)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5824 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Bring down means of sustenance (from Allah (swt)) through (giving) charity."
records.thaqalaynMatn:
The Prophet (sw) said;
"Bring down means of sustenance (from Allah (swt)) through (giving) charity."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5825 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Repel affliction with supplication." (emphasizes the power of supplication (dua) in warding off difficulties and hardships)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5826 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Hearts are naturally inclined to love those who do good to them and to dislike those who harm them."
records.arabicText: 5826 - جُبِلَتِ اَلْقُلُوبُ عَلَى حُبِّ مَنْ أَحْسَنَ إِلَيْهَا وَ بُغْضِ مَنْ أَسَاءَ إِلَيْهَا".
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Hearts are naturally inclined to love those who do good to them and to dislike those who harm them."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5827 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Wealth does not decrease because of (giving in) charity."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5828 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"There is no charity while a close relative is in need." (needy relatives have a bigger right over the money  that was to be given in charity elsewhere)
records.arabicText: 5828 - لاَ صَدَقَةَ وَ ذُو رَحِمٍ مُحْتَاجٌ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "There is no charity while a close relative is in need." (needy relatives have a bigger right over the money  that was to be given in charity elsewhere)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
